zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wilkinson於1615年出生在英國時，她的父親John Wilkinson46歲，母親Prudence Skelton21歲。她於1635年與George Felt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1639年住在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓哈爾斯托且於1897年住在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃爾坦。她去世於1694年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年79歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托斯萬希亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wilkinson于1615年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Wilkinson46岁，母亲Prudence Skelton21岁。她于1635年与George Felt在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1639年住在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓哈爾斯托且于1897年住在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃爾坦。她去世于1694年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年79岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托斯萬希亞。

nameMeanings.name: Wilkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic (‘son of Wilkin’) from Wilkin . Compare Wilkerson .

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.

variants.name: Wilkerson
meanings: English (East Anglia and South East Midlands): from Middle English Wilkeson, a shortened form of Wilkinson , ‘son of Wilkin or young William’. The -r- is intrusive.

variants.name: Wilkison
meanings: English and Scottish: shortened form of Wilkinson or a variant of Wilkieson from the medieval personal name Wilky + -son, meaning ‘son of Wilky’. Compare Wilkie 1.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wilkinson was born in 1615, in England, her father, John Wilkinson, was 46 and her mother, Prudence Skelton, was 21. She married George Felt in 1635, in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1639 and Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States in 1897. She died in 1694, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 79, and was buried in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wilkinson est née en 1615, à Angleterre, son père, John Wilkinson, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Prudence Skelton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé George Felt en 1635, à Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1639 et à Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1897. Elle est décédée en 1694, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wilkinson 1615 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wilkinson 46 und ihre Mutter Prudence Skelton 21. Sie hat 1635 in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America George Felt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1639 hat sie in Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und 1897 in Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb 1694 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wilkinson è nata il nel 1615 nel England, sua padre, John Wilkinson, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Prudence Skelton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato George Felt nel 1635, nel Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1639 e nel Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1897. Morì nel 1694, nel Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilkinsonが1615年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Wilkinsonは46歳，母Prudence Skeltonは21歳であった。1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーチャーレストウンでGeorge Feltと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1639年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンチャーレストウンに，1897年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワルサムに住んでいた。彼女は1694年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで79歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルスワンセアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilkinson(이)가 1615년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wilkinson(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Prudence Skelton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운에서 George Felt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴 찰레스타운에서, 1897년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 월섬에서 살았다. 그녀는 1694년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 스완시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wilkinson nasceu em 1615, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wilkinson, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Prudence Skelton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com George Felt em 1635, em Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1639 e em Waltham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1897. Ela faleceu em 1694, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Swansea, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wilkinson родилась в 1615 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Wilkinson было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Prudence Skelton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Felt в 1635 г. в местности чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности чарльстоун, бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1639 году и в местности валтам, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1897 году. Она умерла в 1694 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности свансеа, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Wilkinson nació en 1615, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Wilkinson, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Prudence Skelton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con George Felt en 1635, en Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Charlestown, Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1639 y en Waltham, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1897. Murió en 1694, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Swansea, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
